title: LifeOre Create S1
description: A relatively lightweight pack featuring Create and its addons, based on the LifeOre Create Series playthrough on Youtube.
body:
A collection of mods mainly focused around the Create Mod 6.0 update for 1.21.1 and its Addons. With other additional gameplay and QoL mods such as Farmers Delight and Sophisticated Backpacks. There are also plenty of optimization mods to improve performance particularly when using shaders with the Create Mod.

This modpack is based on the mods used in LifeOre's Youtube Create Series playthrough, and will be updated over time when mods are used within the playthrough.

_I recommend setting the memory allocated to Minecraft to higher than 2GB for this Modpack_

[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fac5b14c7e77472acc387ded1e5bbcd34240bd36.png)]( https://www.youtube.com/@LifeOreMC)

---

*All Mods are property of their respective owners who work extremely hard to bring us some of the most enjoyable Minecraft gameplay out there*
